main.description: A signed stewardship attestation by a DID about content at a point in time. The atomic unit of the Sporechain network.

subject.description: Scientific name (binomial nomenclature). The taxonomic anchor.

kind.description: What this entry is doing operationally. Extensible via knownValues.

cid.description: IPFS CID pointing to content payload. Required for all kinds except witness.

sourceUri.description: Original locator for the content. An https:// URL, at:// URI, or doi: identifier.

sourceCollection.description: Semantic label for the source system and record (e.g. mycoportal:occurrence:12345, gbif:occurrence:4567).

mirroredAt.description: When the content was pinned or snapshotted. Distinct from createdAt.

tags.description: Classification tags: record type, kingdom, provenance, custom.

parents.description: AT-URI references for DAG linkage. Lineage, provenance, context.
